name: Q5233137
abstract:
David Dworkin (born 1934) is an American conductor, clarinetist, and educator. Much of his career focused on work with young people:

Conductor of the University of Vermont Summer Music Session for 15 years
Music Director of the Vermont Youth Orchestra
Conductor and clarinet teacher of Pre-College Division Orchestra of the Manhattan Scho…

concerts.label: Stelio Dubbiosi, Piano, and David Dworkin, Clarinet

works.t: Sonatina for Clarinet and Piano, Op. 29
Sonata for Clarinet and Piano, FP 184
Grand Duo Concertant in E-flat Major, Op. 48
Sonata in F Minor, Op. 120, No. 1
4 Pieces for Clarinet and Piano, Op. 5
Equations for Clarinet and Piano, Op. 19
Sonata for Clarinet and Piano, FP 184
Trio for Clarinet, Cello, and Piano, Op. 29
Concert Fantasia on Motives from Verdi's "Rigoletto"

about_quotes.speaker: Allan Vaché
about_quotes.evidence: I studied with David Dworkin... They were both very good teachers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Allan Vaché interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000
